name: legal billing clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For legal billing clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We monitor client billing deadlines and flag overdue invoices instead of manual tracking of billing deadlines.
problem_solved: Overdue invoices lead to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Overdue invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
